description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures arranged on a circular pedestal. Two standing figures, draped in long, flowing garments, appear to be interacting with a third, seated figure at the center. The standing figures are positioned on either side of the seated figure, with one reaching out as if in a gesture of comfort or communication. The drapery of the clothing is rendered with detailed folds and texture, giving a sense of movement and realism. The entire piece is carved from a material resembling white marble, with subtle variations in tone and surface texture. The base is roughly cylindrical and textured to resemble stone.
description: A detailed white marble sculpture of three human figures—two standing and one seated—arranged on a textured circular pedestal.
description_view_0: This view shows the two standing figures in profile, with the seated figure partially obscured between them.
description_view_1: The front view reveals all three figures clearly, with the seated figure at the center and the two standing figures flanking and interacting with them.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the draped garments and the close grouping of the figures, with the seated figure mostly hidden.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the backs of the standing figures and the flowing lines of their cloaks, with the pedestal base visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures in a narrative arrangement
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
